original: The Firewall is a mighty, motley collection of heavy duty industrial tools welded together to form a hulking robot, at least eight feet in height. Its round, riveted torso combines with its long, piston-driven arms to give it a hunched, gorilla-like profile. In way of hands it has implacably strong crane grapnels, and its two feet are square and support-flapped, built to take any kind of weight. Its head is a square, blank screen, on which a red exclamation mark blinks interminably.
The firewall’s erratic motions somehow carry the lumbering hulk out of the way of your attack!
The firewall’s thick plates cause the attack to glance off harmlessly.
You cry out as the fire grabs at your "+{var0}+", catching hold and lapping at it lustily.
context: <<POS:00624421>> <<VARS:var0=e.inventory.armor.longName>> combatAppend(" You cry out as the fire grabs at your "+e.inventory.armor.longName+", catching hold and lapping at it lustily.")

original: “How the hell is that non-lethal?!” you yell at So.

“Pest creatures sometimes encroach on the factory space,” replies the AI, sounding mildly apologetic. “Fire induces a state of extreme submissiveness in them. My algorithms calculate a 71% chance that it will have the same effect on"+({var0}.isHuman()?"":" genetically modified")+" humans.”
context: <> <> combatAppend("\n\n“Pest creatures sometimes encroach on the factory space,” replies the AI, sounding mildly apologetic. “Fire induces a state of extreme submissiveness in them. My algorithms calculate a 71% chance that it will have the same effect on"+(e.isHuman()?"":" genetically modified")+" humans.”")

original: The flames licking at your flesh intensify!
